description: Fetch trending GitHub repositories based on recent activity and star count. Returns a ranked list of repositories with metadata including name, description, stars, language, and URL. Filters by time period (daily/weekly/monthly) and programming language.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time range for recent activity: daily, weekly, or monthly

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Filter by primary programming language (e.g. python, javascript, rust)
